commentaries.author: Bede
commentaries.content: The works mentioned here are works of faith. No one can have perfect works unless he has faith, but many have perfect faith without works, since they do not always have time to do them.

commentaries.author: Cyril of Jerusalem
commentaries.content: The person who in faith honors the God and ruler of all has righteousness as his reward.

commentaries.author: Theophylact of Ochrid
commentaries.content: The works of which James speaks are not those of the law but those of righteousness and the other virtues.
